summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PITCH'D copy rewrite iteration 7. All 25+ copy changes verified working correctly. Direct, filmmaker-to-filmmaker tone implemented across entire app.

AI Pick badge correctly styled with teal color (#0d9488) and pill shape (border-radius: 9999px)
EcosystemPromo component (CrossPromo.jsx) correctly shows SLATR and SPOT'D cards after results
Truncation banner correctly positioned under step indicators in Pitchd.jsx
FREE TOOL badge successfully removed from header
'New Pitch' renamed to 'Start Over' in OneSheetBuilder.jsx
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all copy rewrite changes.
